overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a scenic grassland with rocky formations on an alien planet. The character is accompanied by a small creature and travels along a dirt path toward distant mountains under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky grassland starting area with stone platform

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path away from the stone platform, heading toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: stone platform or bench beside the path at the starting point
cluster of purple flowers growing beside the dirt path
massive rocky mountain with a structure visible at the peak, dominating the horizon
scattered boulders and rocky outcrops alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a stone platform in a rocky grassland area. The character walks forward along a dirt path, passing purple wildflowers on the right, with a massive rock formation visible in the distant center. The terrain is sparsely vegetated with patches of grass among the rocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered rock outcrops

events.description: large flying creature passes overhead through the cloudy sky
character begins turning left to follow the winding path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through increasingly tall grass, then turning left to navigate the terrain

notable_agents.action: large flying creature soaring through the clouds overhead

entered.detail: tall golden grass growing densely on both sides of the path
large rock outcrop rising beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves through open grassland where the vegetation grows taller and denser. A flying creature soars overhead in the cloudy sky. The path curves and the character turns left, causing the large distant mountain to shift from center to the left side of the frame as new rocky cliffs appear on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense tall grass field between rocky formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the tall golden grass with rocky cliffs visible on both sides

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with layered stone textures rising beside the path

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dense field of tall golden grass that sways in the wind, with massive rock cliffs now prominent on the left side. The dirt path continues winding through the prairie landscape between rocky outcrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: boulder forest approach with massive rock walls

events.description: entering the Boulder Forest area with increasingly dense rock formations

agents.ego_description: approaching the massive boulder formations and rocky cliffs ahead, continuing along the winding trail

entered.detail: ancient-looking structure or ruins visible atop the distant mountain peak

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the Boulder Forest area, with massive rock walls closing in on the left and the path leading toward distant mountain peaks. An ancient structure becomes visible atop the central mountain as the character continues through the dense golden grass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rocky grassland that gradually transforms into a dense prairie flanked by towering stone walls. It begins at a stone platform where the character walks along a dirt path past purple wildflowers toward a massive distant rock formation. As the character moves forward, the vegetation grows taller and denser while a flying creature soars overhead, and the path curves left to shift the distant mountain toward the edge of the frame. The scene then opens into a field of swaying golden grass that winds between rocky outcrops and prominent cliffs. Finally, the path leads toward the Boulder Forest as massive rock walls close in on the left, revealing an ancient structure atop the central mountain peaks in the distance.
